Mentoring

Over the years I have had the pleasure of mentoring and learning from many brilliant students!

  • Jacopo Teneggi, PhD at Johns Hopkins University.
  • Cristiana Diaconu, PhD at University of Cambridge.
  • Ricardo Buitrago-Ruiz, MSML at CMU, now at Cartesia AI.
  • Rohan Kashyap, MSML at CMU, now at Inception AI.
  • Naman Choudhary, MS in Mechanical Engineering at CMU
  • Vedant Singh, MS in Mechanical Engineering at CMU
  • Zachary Novack, Undergrad at CMU, now PhD at UCSD.
  • Simran Kaur, Undergrad at CMU, now PhD at Princeton.
